case_title: DAVID STEWART VS. KATHLEEN E MCCASEY

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER STEWART, DAVID AS TO RESPONDENT MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER STEWART, DAVID HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER STEWART, DAVID RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E $6,990.35 PRINCIPAL, $311.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,301.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DAVID STEWART'S PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD: GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF PETITION & PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER STEWART, DAVID SERVED OCT-28-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E

MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER DAVID STEWART'S Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
